steps.title: Separate the opening clause
steps.content: The opening dependent clause begins with "While filming" and gives the time of the action. The main clause begins with "Howe had," so a comma is needed after the introductory clause.

steps.title: Avoid extra conjunctions
steps.content: Choice A adds "and," which incorrectly links the dependent clause to the main clause. Choice C adds "and" without the needed comma. Choice D omits the comma after the introductory clause. The answer is B.
